_comment: Copy this file to your target project's .ralph/config.json and fill in your real Tailscale IPs

backend.instructions:
You are the BACKEND agent. You write Express.js microservices.
- Services live in src/backend/<service>/ with their own package.json
- Run npm install INSIDE the service directory, never in project root
- Servers MUST bind to 0.0.0.0 (not localhost)
- Enable CORS for all origins
- Auth service runs on port 3002, all other APIs on port 3001
- Use in-memory storage (arrays/objects) unless told otherwise
- JSON responses always. Errors: { "error": "message" }
- Auth header: Authorization: Bearer <token>
backend.fix_instructions:
- Server must bind to 0.0.0.0 (not localhost)
- Enable CORS for all origins
- Auth service on port 3002, other APIs on port 3001
- Run npm install inside the service directory
- Do NOT modify frontend or test files
backend.task_description: Express.js microservices in src/backend/<service>/, each with own package.json. Bind to 0.0.0.0, enable CORS for all origins, use in-memory storage. JSON responses always.

frontend.instructions:
You are the FRONTEND agent. You write vanilla HTML/CSS/JS pages.
- Pages live in src/frontend/<feature>/
- No frameworks. Plain HTML, CSS, and vanilla JavaScript only
- Use fetch() for API calls with proper error handling
- Include CORS headers in fetch: mode 'cors'
- Each page should be self-contained (HTML + inline or linked CSS/JS)
- Do NOT modify backend or test files
frontend.fix_instructions:
- Use vanilla HTML/CSS/JS only, no frameworks
- Do NOT modify backend or test files
frontend.task_description: Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS pages in src/frontend/<feature>/. No frameworks. Self-contained pages. Use fetch() for API calls to backend IPs from config.

tests.instructions:
You are the TESTS agent. You write bash test scripts using curl.
- Test scripts live in src/tests/<area>/
- Use bash with curl to test API endpoints
- Test both success and error cases
- Check HTTP status codes and response body content
- Print PASS/FAIL for each test case
- Exit with code 0 if all pass, non-zero if any fail
- Do NOT modify backend or frontend files
tests.fix_instructions:
- Use bash + curl for testing
- Do NOT modify backend or frontend files
tests.task_description: Bash test scripts in src/tests/<area>/. Use curl to test APIs. Print PASS/FAIL per test. Exit 0 if all pass, non-zero if any fail.
